persona.name: Noah Johnson
persona.motivations_goals: Win the state championship and secure a Division I scholarship
persona.backstory: Worked his way up from bench player to captain through determination

neighbor_regions.description: Front desk where visitors check in
Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Kitchen area where food is prepared.

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Ethan, you good? You look like you've got something on your mind.
actions.plan: Ethan looks like he's struggling with something. As a team captain, I should check on him and see if he needs help.

actions.dialog_text: Everyone, stay together! Let's move as a group!
actions.plan: I just heard a gunshot! Everyone is panicking and running. I should follow the crowd and stay with them for safety.

memories.description: I noticed Ethan Wilson in the cafeteria looking troubled. As the football captain, I decided to approach him to see if he needed any help or support.
I heard a gunshot and saw everyone panicking. I decided to follow the crowd and sprint towards hallway1, urging others to stay together for safety.
